name: Organic Mongra Saffron
subtitle: The World's Finest Saffron Stigmas
heroSubline: Handpicked from the sun-drenched fields of Pampore, our Mongra saffron represents the pinnacle of purity and potency. Only the deep crimson tips are selected for our royal collection.
description: Our Kashmiri Mongra Saffron is sourced directly from small heritage farms in Pampore. Known as the 'Saffron Capital of India', this region's unique soil produces threads with the highest crocin content in the world.
description2: Each strand is hand-separated and sun-dried using traditional methods passed down through generations. Perfect for high-end culinary use, traditional medicine, and ceremonial rituals.

images.alt: Kashmiri Mongra Saffron threads in a wooden bowl

features: No yellow style, deep red only
origin: Pampore, Kashmir · Harvest: Nov 2024 · Shelf Life: 24 Months

name: Lacha Saffron
subtitle: Stigma & Style — Mid-Grade Excellence
heroSubline: Lacha saffron includes both crimson stigmas and the golden-yellow style, offering a balanced profile that's perfect for everyday cooking and traditional recipes.
description: Lacha saffron is a popular choice for households seeking authentic Kashmiri saffron at a more accessible price. While Mongra uses only the pure red stigmas, Lacha includes the style—the thread connecting stigma to the flower—creating a slightly lighter hue and a distinct, aromatic character.
description2: Ideal for biryanis, kheer, and festive dishes. Our Lacha is handpicked from the same Pampore farms as our Mongra, ensuring quality and traceability.
origin: Pampore, Kashmir · Harvest: Nov 2024 · Shelf Life: 24 Months

name: Kashmiri Mamra Almonds
subtitle: Small in Size, Gigantic in Nutrition
heroSubline: Unlike California almonds, Kashmiri Mamra almonds are grown naturally and are rich in essential oils. Every bite is a burst of Himalayan energy.
description: Kashmiri Mamra Almonds are distinct for their small, concave shape and high oil content. They are grown in the high-altitude orchards of Kashmir without any chemical fertilizers.
description2: Known for their brain-boosting properties and heart-healthy fats, these almonds are a staple of the royal Kashmiri diet. They have a rich, buttery flavor that is incomparable to regular varieties.

images.alt: Kashmiri Mamra Almonds on a copper platter

origin: Himalayan Orchards, Kashmir · Fresh Stock · Shelf Life: 12 Months

name: Snow White Walnut Kernels
subtitle: Buttery, Crisp & Brain-Boosting
heroSubline: Hand-shelled to perfection, our snow-white walnut kernels are the finest yield of the season, offering a crisp texture and rich, buttery finish.
description: Our walnuts are harvested from the high valleys of Kashmir. These 'Snow White' kernels are the highest grade available, selected for their uniform light color and lack of bitterness.
description2: Rich in Omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, these walnuts are not just a snack but a superfood. We ensure they are vacuum-packed to maintain their farm-fresh crunch.

images.alt: Snow White Walnut Kernels on a slate

origin: Kashmir Valleys · Harvested: Oct 2024 · Shelf Life: 9 Months

name: Royal Saffron Infused Honey
subtitle: The Ultimate Elixir of Wellness
heroSubline: Pure Himalayan white honey infused with the finest Mongra saffron threads. A medicinal masterpiece that tastes like heaven.
description: This is not just honey; it's a royal infusion. We take the rarest white honey from the Himalayan foothills and age it with premium Mongra saffron threads to create a unique flavor profile.
description2: The saffron releases its antioxidants and aroma into the honey over time, creating a golden elixir that supports immunity, digestion, and skin health.
origin: Himalayan Foothills · Organic Collection · Shelf Life: 36 Months

name: Multiflora Raw Honey
subtitle: Raw, Organic Mountain Honey
heroSubline: Unprocessed, unfiltered honey from the high-altitude flora of the Himalayas. A true taste of the mountains in every spoonful.
description: Our Multiflora Honey is collected from wild apiaries in the Himalayan foothills. Bees forage across diverse flora—wildflowers, chestnut, rhododendron—creating a complex, nuanced flavor that changes subtly with the seasons.
description2: Never heated or filtered. This honey retains natural enzymes, pollen, and the authentic taste of Himalayan meadows. Ideal for wellness, baking, and as a natural sweetener.
origin: Himalayan Foothills · Wild Collection · Shelf Life: 24 Months

name: Luxury Saffron Box
subtitle: Saffron + Saffron Honey + Almonds — The Perfect Gift
heroSubline: A curated selection of our finest: Mongra saffron, saffron honey, and Mamra almonds. Elegantly packaged for gifting.
description: Our Luxury Saffron Box brings together the crown jewels of Kashmir in one exquisite package. Perfect for weddings, festivals, or anyone who appreciates premium quality.
description2: Each box includes premium Mongra saffron (2g), Royal Saffron Honey (250g), and Kashmiri Mamra Almonds (250g). Packaged in a beautiful presentation box.
origin: Curated in Kashmir · Gift Ready · Shelf Life: 24 Months

name: Royal Kashmir Hamper
subtitle: Premium Assortment — Walnuts, Almonds, Saffron, Honey
heroSubline: Our most generous hamper: saffron, almonds, walnuts, and honey. The complete taste of Kashmir in one stunning package.
description: The Royal Kashmir Hamper is our flagship gift. A comprehensive assortment of Himalayan delicacies—saffron, Mamra almonds, snow white walnuts, and raw honey—perfect for corporate gifting, weddings, or special occasions.
description2: Elegantly presented in a premium hamper box. Each item is from our current harvest, ensuring the finest quality and freshness.
origin: Curated in Kashmir · Gift Ready · Shelf Life: 12 Months
